executiveIntent.problem: OMNISKILL v2 is strong in guardrails and orchestration but under-leverages full Copilot SDK runtime surfaces.
executiveIntent.goal: Deliver OMNISKILL v3 as a Copilot-native, policy-enforced, context-stable, and replay-verifiable operating framework.

framework.name: Hybrid-CO-STAR-RISEN-TIDD-EC
framework.why: Combines strategic clarity, procedural rigor, and strict do/dont boundaries for high-reliability agent execution.

framework.name: Chain-of-Density-Refinement
framework.why: Improves signal quality while reducing prompt bloat across iterative planning and implementation cycles.
framework.policy: Each iteration must add missing specificity while keeping constraints explicit and stable.

contextManagementStrategy.principle: Context is a controlled resource, not an unbounded transcript.

controls.control: Use phase handoff packets containing decisions, constraints, open risks, and next actions.
Use rolling summaries with evidence links to files, tests, and artifacts.
Pin non-negotiables in every prompt: safety rules, acceptance gates, and output schema.
Enforce budget-aware context windows by dropping stale narrative and retaining executable facts.

successMetrics.metric: 100 percent of applicable SDK capability categories integrated.
No critical silent-failure path in controlled stress runs.
No unresolved context-loss defects in phase handoffs.
All execution prompts pass framework lint checks for completeness and contradiction-free constraints.
